mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ai_conversation_message (session_id, message_index, role, content, tokens, model, temperature, created_at, metadata, is_deleted) VALUES
(#{item.sessionId}, #{item.messageIndex}, #{item.role}, #{item.content}, #{item.tokens}, #{item.model}, #{item.temperature}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.metadata}, #{item.isDeleted})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE role = VALUES(role), content = VALUES(content), tokens = VALUES(tokens), model = VALUES(model), temperature = VALUES(temperature), created_at = VALUES(created_at), metadata = VALUES(metadata), is_deleted = VALUES(is_deleted)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_conversation_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY message_index ASC
SELECT * FROM ai_conversation_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND message_index = #{messageIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_conversation_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_conversation_message SET is_deleted = true WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_conversation_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY message_index DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(message_index), -1) FROM ai_conversation_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND is_deleted = false
